key_drivers: Hormuz blockade and Iran conflict driving oil to $94/bbl (WTI) with supply shock premium dominating despite EIA inventory build of +1.9M barrels
DXY weakness (-0.85% YoY, -0.52% 1M at 98.625) providing broad tailwind for commodities, FX, and risk assets; gold at all-time highs near $4,728/oz with $1.93B GLD inflows last week
SOX +26.62% over 1 month and MOVE index -35.80% over 1 month creating favorable backdrop for NQ and equities; credit spreads (HY OAS 2.85%) narrowing from recent highs supporting RTY and YM

stale_sources: DFII10 (real yields): Apr 21 data, 2 business days old, within tolerance
